titleStmt.title: SII 19.378: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 378. (A.R. No. 356 of 1924.) MĒLAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE AGASTYĒŚVARA SHRINE, AGASTYĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This states that on an order issued to them by Aḍigaḷ Paḻavēṭṭaraiyar Kaṇḍaṉ Maṟavaṉār, the nāṭṭār (assembly) of Kuṉṟak-kūṟṟam changed the old name of the village Uṟattūr into Karuppūr, and removing the tenancy over it from Kāḍan Mārāyaṉ of Marudūr, transferred it as janmabhūmi in favour of Vēṅgaḍavaṉ Araṅgaṉ alias Śembiyaṉ Viṟaināṭṭu-Kōnār of Karuppūr for a fixed annual rent of 25 kaḻañju of gold. This is evidently an inscription of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉmarkku yā
ṇṭu 10 5Āvatu kuṉṟakkūṟṟattu nāṭ
ṭomukku Aṭikaḷ paḻaveṭṭaraiyar kaṇṭaṉ ma
ṟavaṉār Innāṭṭu Uṟattūrp paḻam
perum paḻaṅkuṭiyūm nikki karuppūru
ṭaiya veṅkaṭavaṉ Araṅkaṉāṉa cem
piyaṉ viṟaināṭṭukonārkku janma
bhūmiyākak karuppūreṉṉum perāl kā
ṇiceytu Itukku Āṭṭaivaṭṭam tāla
ccemmaipoṉ Irupattaiyṅkaḻañ
cu cantrādityaval nilai Iṟaiyāvatākavum nā
m tarañ ceyyumpotu Irupattaiyṅ
kaḻañcu mallatu Eṟkat tarañceyyāta
tākavum Ipparicu candrādittavat kāṇi
yākac ceytukuṭuttom nāṭṭār niṅ
kaḷum Ipparicu ceytukuṭuṅkaḷeṉṟaruḷi
cceyya nāṭṭomum Iṉṉāṭṭu Uṟattū
rai paḻamperum paḻaṅkuṭiyum nikki karuppū
reṉṉum peyarākki Āṭṭaivaṭṭam nilai
yiṟai tālaccemmaipoṉ Irupattai
yṅkaḻañcākki nāṭṭom tarañceyum po
ṉ Irupattaiyṅkaḻañcu mallatu Eṟatta
rañ ceyyātatākavum I
pparicu karuppūruṭaiya ve
ṅkaṭavaṉ Araṅkaṉāṉa
cempiyaṉ viṟaiṉāṭ
ṭukkoṉārkku janmabhūmiyāka
karuppūreṉṉum peyariṉāl
cantrātittaval kāṇiyāka I
ṟaiyolai ceytukuṭut
tom kuṉṟakkūṟṟattu nāṭ
ṭom ciṟṟiṟaiyum Aṇa
c
Ivai paḻaveṭṭaraiyaṉ kaṇṭaṉ maṟa
vaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ipparicu I
cainto marutūruṭaiya kāṭaṉ māṟayaṉe
ṉ Ivai yeṉṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 19.378 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
